note: Projected depth chart as of June 2026. Based on published reports, spring practice notes, portal additions, and roster data. No positions are confirmed until fall camp. Subject to change.

positionBattles.label: Left Tackle Battle
positionBattles.note: Kelvin Banks Jr. departed for NFL. Trevor Goosby and Jaydon Chatman competing.

positionBattles.label: LB2 Spot
positionBattles.note: Behind Rasheem Biles, the second LB spot is genuinely open.

QB.portalContext: MJ Morris added from NC State as experienced backup.

players.label: QB1
players.name: Arch Manning
players.note: Unquestioned starter. 3,472 yds, 29 TD in 2025.

players.label: QB2
players.name: MJ Morris
players.note: Former NC State starter. 1,850 yds, 16 TD (2024). Solid emergency option.

players.label: QB3
players.name: KJ Lacey
players.note: Redshirt freshman developing. Long-term upside.

RB.portalContext: Raleek Brown (Oklahoma State) and Hollywood Smothers (Arizona State) added as lead backs.

players.label: RB1
players.name: Raleek Brown
players.note: Projected RB1. Veteran big-play back from Oklahoma State.

players.label: RB2
players.name: Hollywood Smothers
players.note: Change-of-pace back. Pass-catching specialist.

players.label: RB3
players.name: Derrek Cooper
players.note: True freshman with upside. ST and spot duty.

WR.portalContext: Cam Coleman (Auburn 5★) leads the group. Emmett Mosley V, Sterling Berkhalter, Ty Boatright, Rett Andersen all added via portal.

players.label: WR-X
players.name: Cam Coleman
players.note: 5-star portal addition. Paired with Wingo creates unsolvable matchup problem.

players.label: WR-Z
players.name: Ryan Wingo
players.note: 38 rec, 624 yds in 2025. Legitimate WR1 — Coleman's arrival elevates him further.

players.label: Slot
players.name: Jermaine Bishop Jr.
players.note: Texas native competing for slot WR3 snaps.

players.label: WR4
players.name: Emmett Mosley V
players.note: Slot depth and rotational WR.

TE.portalContext: Michael Masunas added from Navy to fill the TE void.

players.label: TE1
players.name: Michael Masunas
players.note: Fills Billingsley void. Blocking and short-to-mid passing game TE.

players.label: TE2
players.name: Bryce Chambers
players.note: Senior depth. Blocking specialist.

players.label: TE3
players.name: Ridge Barker
players.note: Long-term development piece.

OL.portalContext: Kelvin Banks Jr. (1st round OT) departed. LT is the primary open competition.

players.label: LT
players.name: Trevor Goosby
players.note: Competing to replace Banks Jr. at LT. Most likely internal candidate.

players.label: LG
players.name: Melvin Siani
players.note: Returning starter. Provides OL anchor.

players.label: C
players.name: Robert Sweeney
players.note: Senior center. Snapping stability.

players.label: RG
players.name: Brandon Baker
players.note: Interior OL anchor.

players.label: RT
players.name: Jaydon Chatman
players.note: RT spot — competing but projected starter.

EDGE.portalContext: No portal additions needed — Simmons anchors this group.

players.label: EDGE1
players.name: Colin Simmons
players.note: 10.5 sacks in 2025. Best pass rusher in college football. Unblockable at his peak.

players.label: EDGE2
players.name: Colton Vasek
players.note: 4.5 sacks in 2025. Quality rotation behind Simmons.

players.label: EDGE3
players.name: Justus Terry
players.note: Second-year edge with upside. Depth and development.

DT.portalContext: T'Vondre Sweat graduated and was drafted. Interior DL is a developing need.

players.label: DT1
players.name: Hero Kanu
players.note: Senior interior anchor. Provides experience at DT.

players.label: DT2
players.name: Maraad Watson
players.note: Competing for second DT spot. Strong development arc.

LB.portalContext: Rasheem Biles (Ohio State) added to replace Anthony Hill Jr. (NFL, 1st round).

players.label: LB1
players.name: Rasheem Biles
players.note: Replaces Anthony Hill Jr. Ohio State veteran brings immediate production.

players.label: LB2
players.name: Justin Cryer
players.note: Senior competing for second LB slot.

players.label: LB3
players.name: Ty'Anthony Smith
players.note: Linebacker depth.

CB.portalContext: Derek Williams Jr. (Penn State, Big Ten All-Conference) added alongside returning Malik Muhammad.

players.label: CB1
players.name: Malik Muhammad
players.note: 4 INTs, 11 PDs in 2025. Consensus #1 CB in 2024 recruiting class.

players.label: CB2
players.name: Derek Williams Jr.
players.note: Proven SEC-level corner. Pairs with Muhammad for elite CB room.

players.label: CB3
players.name: Kobe Black
players.note: Slot corner depth and special teams.

S.portalContext: No portal additions at safety. Internal development required.

players.label: SS
players.name: Jelani McDonald
players.note: Senior strong safety. Returning starter.

players.label: FS
players.name: Jonah Williams
players.note: Second-year safety stepping into larger role.

players.label: S3
players.name: Bo Mascoe
players.note: Senior versatility piece. ST and rotation depth.

players.label: K
players.name: Gianni Spetic
players.note: Returning starter.

players.label: P
players.name: Mac Chiumento
players.note: Returning starter.
